title: 2 Pack 26 x 4.0 Fat Tire Tube Schrader Valve, Puncture Proof Bike Tubes for 26 x 4 Bicycle Tire, Butyl Rubber Inner Tube for EBike/Electric Bike/Mountain Bike
features: Size: 32mm Schrader valve. Replacement bike tube for 26" x 4.0 fat tire bikes, mountain bikes, electric bicycle, electric motorcycle and electric tricycle.
Easy to Install: The package comes with 2 levers. It prevents your fingers from getting caught in the tire and helps you easily remove the old inner tube and install the new one in a few minutes.

More Durable: Our 26x4 bike tube is made of high-quality butyl rubber material with good heat resistance and air tightness. And each bike tire tube has passed strict quality inspection to ensure that it can be used for a long time.

Comfortable Riding: 26x4.0 Fat tire tube can absorb the impact on bumpy roads, adding comfort to your riding. Please note that before purchasing, please check sidewall markings on your tire and choose the correct size according to the markings.

Quality Service: We adhere to the principle of customer first. If you have any questions about our products or services, please feel free to contact us through Amazon message, we will provide you with solutions in time.
description: Product Description 2 Pack 26x4.0 Fat Tire Tube What's in the box? 26" Bike tire tube × 2 Tire removal lever × 2 Product weight: 2.83lb Gesinikad inner tubes are designed for your safe ride. We always care about your ride. Applicable Scenarios Please carefully select the valve. Many air pumps can accept both valves but some accept only one. Previous page Deflate tire Remove any puncturing objects. Pry the tire Use thin end of tire lever to pry tire from rim. Insert 2nd lever 3 spokes away. Move levers in opposite direction. Remove the inner tube Reach in between the rim and tire and remove tube. Check inside of tire for sharp objects and remove them. Insert the new tube Before installing, slightly inflate new tube to give it shape. Insert tube valve through rim hole. Gently push the tube into place inside the tire. Insert the tire Work tire back onto rim being careful not to pinch the tube. Use of tire levers is recommended. Inflate inner tube Remove any puncturing objects. Next page Bicycle Inner Tubes 26 Inch Bike Tubes Add To Basket 16 Inch Bike Tubes Add To Basket 24 Inch Bike Tubes Add To Basket 27.5 Inch Bike Tubes Add To Basket 29 Inch Bike Tubes Add To Basket Quantity 2-Pcs 2-Pcs 2-Pcs 2-Pcs 2-Pcs Valve Type Schrader Valve Schrader Valve Schrader Valve Schrader Valve Schrader Valve Valve Long 32 mm 32 mm 32 mm 32 mm 32 mm Tire Levers 2-Pcs 2-Pcs 2-Pcs 2-Pcs 2-Pcs Size 26" x 4.0 16" x 1.75-2.125 24" x 1.75-2.125 27.5" x 1.75-2.125 29" x 2.125-2.4
